# Toolique - Free Online Calculators, Developer Tools & Academy
> Toolique is a free, privacy-focused online suite of 100+ interactive calculators, developer utilities, 3D printing tools, math studio solvers, and programming academy tools operating completely in the browser without server data collection.

## Core Capabilities & Tool Studios

- [3D Print Studio](https://www.toolique.in/3d-print-studio): Filament cost, resin volume, print pricing, Bambu Lab AMS slot planner, HueForge layer planner, and print farm revenue calculators.
- [Math Studio](https://www.toolique.in/math-studio): 22 browser-based mathematical tools covering equation solvers, matrix arithmetic, descriptive statistics, 2D/3D geometry, calculus derivatives/integrals, and Fourier transforms.
- [Tools Directory](https://www.toolique.in/tools): Full catalog of 100+ free calculators spanning Finance (GST, HRA, SIP, EMI), Developer (JSON, Base64, Regex, JWT), Image processing, Civil/BOQ, and Text utilities.
- [Developer Playground](https://www.toolique.in/playground): Client-side sandboxed environment for JavaScript execution, JSON manipulation, Python scripts, and REST API testing.
- [AI Studio](https://www.toolique.in/ai): Browser-sandboxed AI models for instant SQL query generation, test case validation, and regex pattern synthesis.
- [Toolique Academy](https://www.toolique.in/academy): Interactive coding challenges, technical interview prep (SQL, Python, JavaScript, React, QA Automation), visual explainers, and browser sandboxes.

## Key Static & Informational Pages

- [About Toolique](https://www.toolique.in/about): Platform mission, privacy-first client-side architecture, and tech stack details.
- [About Founder](https://www.toolique.in/about-founder): Info on Ajinkya Swami, Software Architect and QA Automation Engineer.
- [Knowledge Base & Blog](https://www.toolique.in/blog): Technical articles, calculation guides, and developer roadmaps.
- [Privacy Policy](https://www.toolique.in/privacy-policy): Zero-data collection disclosure and local browser storage security.
- [Terms & Conditions](https://www.toolique.in/terms-conditions): Usage rights and terms for online calculators.

## Full Catalog & System Information

- Full API & Tool Directory: [llms-full.txt](https://www.toolique.in/llms-full.txt)
- XML Sitemap: [sitemap.xml](https://www.toolique.in/sitemap.xml)
- Canonical Domain: https://www.toolique.in
